productDisplayName: Fila Men Glow Black Sports Shoes
description: Perfect for those who love to play on the court, the fila Glow shoe is designed for those who love those healthy runs.UpperMesh upper for lightweight comfort and absolute breathabilityStrategically placed synthetic and leather overlays for added shoe structureAsymmetrical lace-up system for an abrasion-free, sung, customised FitMeshed and heavily padded tongue and padded fabric collar for snug, all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfortFabric footbed for sweat-free wearRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleTPR outsole with modified waffle pattern lugs on the forefoot and a decoupled raised heel for absolute grip on various terrainsHorse-shoe shaped heel with a scopped middle for absolute shock-absorption and cushioned comfortPlastic curved trusstic shank for inner arch supportOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard for enhanced forefoot protectionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
